value.title: Tavily Enterprise - AWS Marketplace
value.content: # Tavily Enterprise. Contact sales@tavily.com for requesting a private offer. Tavily Enterprise: The Web Infrastructure Layer for AI Agents. A purpose-built web API for real-time search, scraping, crawling, and structured data retrieval. AI-native enterprises trust Tavily for data enrichment, research, RAG pipelines, and autonomous AI systems-ensuring fresh, accurate, and scalable intelligence. Built for AI Agents : Unlike traditional web APIs, Tavily delivers structured, customizable data retrieval with full control over search depth, domain targeting, and content extraction via a single API call. Enterprise-Grade Security : SOC 2 certified with zero data retention and an AI security layer to prevent prompt injection and data leakage. Scalable & Reliable : Custom API throughput, guaranteed uptime, and enterprise SLAs support high-volume AI workloads. Trusted by 1,00,000+ developers and AI leaders, Tavily is the go-to solution for real-time, structured web access. | Tavily Enterprise | Tavily Enterprise delivers secure, scalable web data retrieval for your AI agents, backed by enterprise-grade support and reliability.

value.title: Agents Towards Production — Tavily Search API— Real-Time Web ...
value.content: Tavily is used to retrieve relevant, real-time web data or documents, optimized for language model consumption. Tavily is a modern retrieval

value.title: Tavily
value.content: Join Tavily at one of our events. Meet the team, connect with the community, and see what we're building. # Connect your AI agents to the web. One API for search, extraction, research, crawling, and mapping, built for production workloads and real traffic. Retrieve fresh, reranked web context that agents can reason over. Extract web data without the noise. Capture entire sites with intent. Turn fragmented pages into site graphs. Reranked results are distilled into information-rich snippets, so agents reason without wasting tokens on noise. ## Our partners shape the future of agents. Use Tavily within our partner marketplaces and agent-native platforms. ### AWS. ### Microsoft Azure. ### Snowflake. ### Databricks. ### LangChain. Default Search in LangSmith Agent Builder. ## Power your AI with real-time web search. By submitting my email address, I agree to receive marketing communications. For more information, please see the Privacy Policy. Trusted by 2M+ AI builders.
